query:
INSERT INTO siteContent (page, section, contentKey, contentValue) VALUES 
('founder', 'truth', 'title', 'Speaking Truth'),
('founder', 'truth', 'paragraph1', 'Real change is both individual and collective—an energetic imprint that reverberates through humanity.'),
('founder', 'truth', 'paragraph2', 'Just Empower is built on this truth.'),
('founder', 'depth', 'title', 'Going Deeper'),
('founder', 'depth', 'paragraph1', 'My understanding of trauma, healing, and transformation is not theoretical; it was forged through lived experience.'),
('founder', 'depth', 'paragraph2', 'I was not taught—I was tempered. Not by intellect, but by initiation.');
